meaning: n.忠实,诚实,忠诚,保真度,(收音机,录音设备等的)逼真度,保真度,重现精度
examples: Fidelity means accuracy of the copying process.
People have failed to act in fidelity to their vows.
The Proficient MaxTV is uniquely designed to bring high fidelity audio performance to flat panel TVs.
It was 30.8% for the PBHG fund and 17.6% for the Fidelity fund.
